EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} assigned the role with ID {object.new_value} to the user group "{object.name}" on entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the role "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the system role "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the role "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the role for the user {object.account.name} on entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} assigned the global role with ID {object.new_value} to the user {object.account.name} on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} assigned the role with ID {object.new_value} to the user {object.account.name} on entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the role with ID {object.id} on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the role for the user group "{object.name}" on entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created or updated privilege {object.id} on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} assigned the global role with ID {object.new_value} to the user group "{object.name}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
